title: Rickverse
description: An immersive idle card collection game set in the Rick and Morty multiverse. Developed with strategic mechanics, featuring a custom resource management engine and optimized state handling for smooth incremental gameplay.

title: DeepvoidGate
description: A complex web-based Space Idle management game. Utilizes a high-performance backend and a React-based interface for exploring the universe, resource management, and colony building.

title: EcoNest
description: An aquarium diary application focusing on metadata management and image analysis. Features include custom file handling, status tracking, and a highly interactive UI for managing aquatic life documentation.

title: Space Idle Game
description: An empire-building simulation where players manage resources and expand through the universe. Focused on algorithmic scaling and progressive game balance.

title: Deepvoid Games
description: Portfolio and landing page for an independent game studio. Designed with high-quality visual storytelling and clean, modern aesthetics to showcase unique game worlds.

title: food.fern.fun
description: A specialized recipe exploration platform with advanced tagging and search functionality. Implements complex filtering logic to provide a seamless user experience for discovering culinary inspiration.

title: apiv2.fern.fun
description: A high-performance backend service designed with Python. Features include robust RESTful API architecture, CRUD operations, and scalable endpoint management for mobile and web consumption.

title: games.fern.fun
description: An educational geography game challenge. Implements interactive game logic and state management to test users' recognition of world flags and geographical data.

title: elektronhack
description: Collaborative hackathon platform created to facilitate innovation. Developed the landing page and event management interface to coordinate developers, designers, and entrepreneurs.

title: tools.fern.fun
description: A suite of web development utilities designed to increase developer efficiency. Includes tools for rapid prototyping and common programming tasks.

title: ssh-alert
description: A security monitoring tool that provides real-time notifications for SSH login attempts, increasing server security awareness.

title: cloud.fern.fun
description: A scalable cloud storage platform built for secure data access. Focuses on robust infrastructure, scalable storage architecture, and modern web security practices.

title: pi.fern.fun
description: A real-time server dashboard for monitoring system health. Features live metrics, system status overview, and log management for Raspberry Pi and similar server environments.
